title: Lombina: Englishlah & Melayunya
description: Adds joke languages inspired by some old conversation in the Minecraft Translators Discord server
body:
# Lombina: Englishlah & Melayunya Added a few joke languages inspired by an inside joke within the Minecraft Translators Discord server
Addedlah alah fewlah jokelah languageslah inspiredlah bylah anlah insidelah jokelah withinlah thelah Minecraftlah Translatorslah Discordlah serverlah
Addednya anya fewnya jokenya languagesnya inspirednya bynya annya insidenya jokenya withinnya thenya Minecraftnya Translatorsnya Discordnya servernya
**Why "Lombina"? / Kenapa "Lombina"?**
- The direct translation of "Mine" and "Craft" is "**Lomb**ong" dan "**Bina**" respectively. That is then merged into "Lombina". And that name kind of fits as a name for this series of "joke" packs. [Thanks Ahmad!](https://imgur.com/a/lombina-idea-xvWXUYX)
Terjemahan "Mine" dan "Craft" secara terus ialah "**Lomb**ong" dan "**Bina**". Kedua perkataan tersebut kemudian digabung menjadi "Lombina". Dan nama itu agak sesuai untuk koleksi pek "lawak" ini. [Terima kasih Ahmad!](https://imgur.com/a/lombina-idea-xvWXUYX) --- **What is the joke?**
This screenshot will summarize the joke perfectly

So, thanks for that, Ahmad and Turbo :)
---
Available Language Options / Availablelah Languagenya Optionslah
- **Englishlah (Malaysialah)** - British English but with `nya` suffix on every word - Versions 1.0 and below uses American English instead - **Englishnya (Malaysianya) (v2.0+)** - British English but with `nya` suffix on every word - **Bahasalah Melayulah (Malaysialah) (v2.0+)** - Rumi Malay but with `lah` suffix on every word, even those that already ends with `lah` - **Bahasanya Melayunya (Malaysianya) (v2.0+)** - Rumi Malay but with `nya` suffix on every word, even those that already ends with `nya` - **بهاسله ملايوله (مليسياله) (v2.0+)** - Jawi Malay but with `له` suffix on every word, even those that already ends with `له` - **بهاسڽ ملايوڽ (مليسياڽ) (v2.0+)** - Jawi Malay but with `ڽ` suffix on every word, even those that already ends with `ڽ`

v1.0 | - The v2.0 packs for 1.8 and 1.12 *may* be released on a later date... You could use these packs outside of their supported versions (for example the 1.20-1.21 pack in 1.18/17), just expect missing translations and whatnot (especially on pre-1.19 versions) --- **Credits / Creditslah**
